ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the capital city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the capital city */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "governance_type" TEXT /* Type of governance (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the happiness score */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score for the country in the given year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the happiness score data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to calculate the score */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the economic indicator */,
  "economy_score" REAL /* Economic score for the country in the given year */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to calculate the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family support score record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the family support score */,
  "family_score" REAL /* Family support score for the country in the given year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the family support score data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to calculate the score */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_support_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the health indicator */,
  "health_score" REAL /* Health score for the country in the given year */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Infant mortality rate */,
  "healthcare_spending" REAL /* Healthcare spending as a percentage of GDP */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the health indicator data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to calculate the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freedom_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freedom score record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the freedom score */,
  "freedom_score" REAL /* Freedom score for the country in the given year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the freedom score data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to calculate the score */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trust_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trust score record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the trust score */,
  "trust_score" REAL /* Trust score for the country in the given year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trust score data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to calculate the score */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trust_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generosity_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generosity score record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the generosity score */,
  "generosity_score" REAL /* Generosity score for the country in the given year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the generosity score data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to calculate the score */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "differences" (
  "diff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difference record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "happiness_diff" REAL /* Difference in happiness score between 2015 and 2019 */,
  "economy_diff" REAL /* Difference in economic score between 2015 and 2019 */,
  "family_diff" REAL /* Difference in family support score between 2015 and 2019 */,
  "health_diff" REAL /* Difference in health score between 2015 and 2019 */,
  "freedom_diff" REAL /* Difference in freedom score between 2015 and 2019 */,
  "trust_diff" REAL /* Difference in trust score between 2015 and 2019 */,
  "generosity_diff" REAL /* Difference in generosity score between 2015 and 2019 */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the difference data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to calculate the differences */,
  "confidence_intervals" TEXT /* Confidence intervals for the differences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_differences_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user creation */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time in milliseconds */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
